title: Parent-governed autonomy
preconditions: Parent preferences require approval for new modalities and trajectory revisions.
Autonomous teacher has enough learner state to suggest a modality or trajectory change.
Parent approval enforcement rollout mode is guided or strict.

rehearsal_steps.action: Generate or refresh a session suggestion for a learner with stalled progress.
rehearsal_steps.expected_observation: Household overview shows a pending suggestion and any blocking approval request.
rehearsal_steps.proof_signal: The system can initiate meaningful teaching work without a teacher manually picking the next activity.

rehearsal_steps.action: Open the approval preview for the proposed modality or trajectory change.
rehearsal_steps.expected_observation: Preview lists if-approved and if-denied consequences plus rollout constraints.
rehearsal_steps.proof_signal: Parent authority is legible before the action is taken.

rehearsal_steps.expected_observation: The suggestion remains constrained or falls back to an approved modality/trajectory path.
rehearsal_steps.proof_signal: A denial changes what the autonomous teacher can do next.

rehearsal_steps.expected_observation: The learner plan updates and the approved path becomes available for the next session.
rehearsal_steps.proof_signal: A parent decision can safely widen autonomy in a controlled way.

expected_observations: Autonomous suggestions are visible before learner delivery.
Parent approvals, denials, and constraints change effective behavior.
Operator explainability shows cadence, modality, blockers, and rollout effects.
success_criteria: At least one autonomous action is blocked by parent policy.
Rejecting and approving produce different visible next states.
The explanation bundle identifies remaining blockers and expected consequences.
reset_notes: Reset approval requests by creating a fresh relationship state or using a different learner.
